data.title: Trump Urges Federal Reserve to Lower Interest Rates
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that now is the optimal time for Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell to reduce interest rates. Trump criticized Powell for consistently acting too late in such matters.

data.title: Sui Ecological Protocol Scallop ranks fourth among all lending protocols in terms of fees and revenue in the past 7 days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News DefiLlama data shows that Scallop's revenue in the past 7 days exceeded 279,000 US dollars, ranking fourth in the lending protocol, second only to Venus, AAVE and Kaminolend. In addition, during the FDUSD depegging period, Scallop suspended its lending function for 24 hours, and its fee revenue in the past 7 days still exceeded 641,000 US dollars, also ranking fourth in the lending protocol.
It is reported that Scallop and Binance Wallet have recently jointly launched a simple income activity, and users can get additional rewards by depositing USDC.

data.title: Trump: Now is the best time for Fed Chairman Powell to cut interest rates
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump: For Federal Reserve Chairman Powell, now is the best time to cut interest rates. Federal Reserve Chairman Powell always acts too late. (Jinshi)

data.title: SOL breaks through 120 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 5.62%
data.description: OKX market shows that SOL has broken through 120 USDT and is now at 120.05 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 5.62%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: DWF Labs transfers 25 million USDC to Trump family crypto project WLFI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to OnChain Lens monitoring, DWF Labs transferred 25 million USDC to the Trump family's encryption project World Liberty Finance.

data.title: A whale spent $20.78 million to buy 11,463 ETH in the past 6 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale created a new wallet and spent US$20.78 million to buy 11,463 ETH in the past 6 hours, with an average price of US$1,813.

data.title: Bitcoin bulls defend $80K support as ‘World War 3 of trade wars’ crushes US stocks
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) price dodged the chaotic volatility that crushed equities markets on the April 4 Wall Street open by holding above the $82,000 level. BTC/USD 1-hour chart. Fears over a prolonged US trade war and subsequent recession fueled market downside, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite Index both falling another 3
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-bulls-defend-80-k-support-as-world-war-3-of-trade-wars-crushes-us-stocks?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethena Labs: USDe is now officially launched on BNB Chain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ethena Labs announced that USDe has been officially launched on BNB Chain, and users can use Ethena assets on BNB Chain for exchange, lending and savings.

data.title: Bitcoin Experiences Decline Below 82,000 USDT
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bitcoin has fallen below the 82,000 USDT mark, currently trading at 81,977.08 USDT. The cryptocurrency has experienced a daily decrease of 1.47%.

data.title: Standard Chartered: Bitcoin is expected to rebound to $88,500 this week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Standard Chartered Bank created a hypothetical "Mag7B" index last week, converting Tesla into Bitcoin. Now the bank calls Bitcoin a "strongman" because it has performed better than most technology stocks in the recent market sell-off. The bank recommends "HODLing" the cryptocurrency, saying that Bitcoin's resilience may allow it to return to $88,500 this weekend. (The Block)
